headline: Texas Capital Announces Strategic Leadership Appointments to Support Next Phase of Growth
summary: Names Jeff Hood Chief Human Resources Officer; Aligns executive leadership team to scale platformDALLAS, April 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI), the parent company of Texas Capital, today announced a series of strategic executive leadership appointments designed to scale the firm’s clearly differentiated platform in its next phase of growth.
